title: Moosend vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Moosend and Flodesk email marketing tools. Pricing, features, and which is best for your business.
intro: Moosend and Flodesk are both capable email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Moosend prioritizes affordability and automation for growing businesses, while Flodesk focuses on design-first functionality for creative professionals. Understanding their key differences will help you choose the right tool for your needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Unlimited emails, automation workflows, A/B testing, real-time analytics
comparison_table.tool_b: Beautiful templates, unlimited subscribers at flat price, checkout forms, link in bio

choose_a_if: You have a tight budget and want to start free with email marketing
You need advanced automation workflows and A/B testing capabilities
You want unlimited emails and plan to scale to larger subscriber lists affordably
choose_b_if: You prioritize stunning, visually appealing email templates and design
You're a creative professional (photographer, designer, artist) who wants flat-rate pricing
You want unlimited subscribers included from day one without worrying about list size limits

faq.a: It depends on your priorities. Moosend is better for budget-conscious users who need automation and don't mind simpler templates, while Flodesk is superior if you're a visual brand that wants beautifully designed emails included in a flat price. Both have strong ratings (Moosend: 4.7 G2, Flodesk: 4.8 G2), so the choice comes down to your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Flodesk?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, with a free tier for up to 1,000 subscribers and paid plans starting at just $9/month. Flodesk has no free tier and starts at $38/month. However, Flodesk includes unlimited subscribers at any price tier, while Moosend's free tier caps subscribers at 1,000.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms allow you to export your subscriber list and email templates. Both Moosend and Flodesk support standard email migration processes. You should export your contacts and recreate or adapt your email templates in Moosend, which may take some time depending on your list size and complexity.
